platform_decisions.title: Structured Output Schema Caching Strategy
platform_decisions.decision: Cache Structured Output JSON schemas with LRU eviction to prevent per-turn schema re-serialization overhead.
platform_decisions.rationale: Fixed critical bug where multiple schemas caused ~50% failure rate. Caching reduces per-turn JSON.stringify calls on MCP tool schemas, improving prompt cache hit rate on long sessions.
platform_decisions.trades: Additional memory per session (bounded by schema set size) vs. reduced token overhead and faster cache hits.

platform_decisions.title: Hook Output Spill-to-Disk Policy
platform_decisions.decision: When hook output exceeds 50KB, save to disk with file path + preview instead of injecting directly into context.
platform_decisions.rationale: Prevents context bloat from verbose hook outputs while maintaining visibility via file references. Balances context efficiency with hook transparency.
platform_decisions.trades: Adds filesystem write vs. simpler single-context injection model.

platform_decisions.title: Managed Settings Drop-in Directory Pattern
platform_decisions.decision: Support `managed-settings.d/` directory alongside `managed-settings.json` for fragment-based policy composition with alphabetical merge.
platform_decisions.rationale: Enables independent teams to deploy policy fragments without coordinating a single monolithic settings file. Reduces merge conflicts and deployment coupling.
platform_decisions.trades: Slightly more complex merge logic vs. centralized policy management.

platform_decisions.title: Deferred Permission Decision Pattern
platform_decisions.decision: Introduce `"defer"` permission decision in PreToolUse hooks: headless sessions can pause at a tool call and resume with `--resume` for re-evaluation.
platform_decisions.rationale: Enables asynchronous permission workflows without blocking the parent session. Critical for headless integrations and external approval systems.
platform_decisions.trades: Adds session state (deferred tool call) that persists across restarts vs. simpler synchronous prompt model.

platform_decisions.title: Context Compaction Thrash Detection
platform_decisions.decision: Detect and halt autocompaction when context refills to the limit immediately after three consecutive compactions, surfacing an actionable error instead of burning API calls.
platform_decisions.rationale: Prevents infinite compaction loops on pathological conversation patterns. Provides clear signal to users that session cleanup is needed.
platform_decisions.trades: Requires detecting refill pattern (3-turn state machine) vs. simpler unbounded retry logic.

platform_decisions.title: MCP Elicitation Dialog Support
platform_decisions.decision: Support MCP servers requesting structured input mid-task via interactive dialog (form fields or browser URL) without blocking the main agent.
platform_decisions.rationale: Enables rich, stateful MCP workflows (e.g., approval flows, multi-step interactions) without forcing tool-use ping-pong patterns.
platform_decisions.trades: Adds dialog state management and async input handling vs. simple sequential tool-use model.

platform_decisions.title: Sparse Checkout for Large Monorepos
platform_decisions.decision: Support `worktree.sparsePaths` setting to enable git sparse-checkout in subagent worktrees, checking out only specified directories.
platform_decisions.rationale: Reduces setup time and disk usage for large monorepos. Critical for organizations with multi-hundred-directory codebases.
platform_decisions.trades: Adds sparse-checkout state management vs. full clone simplicity.

platform_decisions.title: Hook Conditional Execution via Permission Syntax
platform_decisions.decision: Support conditional `if` field in hooks using permission rule syntax (e.g., `Bash(git *)`) to filter execution, reducing process spawning overhead.
platform_decisions.rationale: Avoids spawning hooks for tool calls that don't match the condition. Optimizes performance for high-frequency hooks.
platform_decisions.trades: Adds condition evaluation logic vs. hook-always-runs model.

platform_decisions.title: PermissionDenied Hook Event
platform_decisions.decision: Fire PermissionDenied hook after auto mode classifier denials, allowing handlers to return `{retry: true}` to retry the tool call.
platform_decisions.rationale: Enables policies like 'auto-deny then escalate to human' without blocking the agent. Separates denial decision from retry policy.
platform_decisions.trades: Adds hook event that must be handled vs. simpler terminal-denial model.

platform_decisions.title: MCP OAuth RFC 9728 Metadata Discovery
platform_decisions.decision: Follow RFC 9728 Protected Resource Metadata discovery for MCP OAuth servers, supporting CIMD (Client ID Metadata Document) for servers without Dynamic Client Registration.
platform_decisions.rationale: Enables broader MCP ecosystem compatibility without requiring proprietary OAuth configurations. Reduces setup friction for enterprise IdPs (ADFS, etc.).
platform_decisions.trades: Additional metadata fetch roundtrip vs. direct server configuration.

platform_decisions.title: Plugin Marketplace Source Inlining
platform_decisions.decision: Support `source: 'settings'` to declare plugin marketplace entries inline in settings.json, eliminating need for separate marketplace clone.
platform_decisions.rationale: Simplifies offline deployments and air-gapped environments. Reduces external dependency on marketplace availability.
platform_decisions.trades: Larger settings.json + manual plugin manifest maintenance vs. external marketplace source.

platform_decisions.title: StopFailure Hook Event
platform_decisions.decision: Fire StopFailure hook when a turn ends due to API error (rate limit, auth failure, etc.) to enable custom error handling.
platform_decisions.rationale: Allows policies like 'on rate limit, pause and notify' without introspecting the assistant message. Decouples error signals from turn termination.
platform_decisions.trades: Adds new hook event type vs. relying on message content inspection.

platform_decisions.title: Agent Initial Prompt Frontmatter
platform_decisions.decision: Support `initialPrompt` field in agent frontmatter to auto-submit a first-turn prompt without user interaction.
platform_decisions.rationale: Enables stateless agent invocations (e.g., via `/team-onboarding` or workflow integrations) without requiring explicit user input.
platform_decisions.trades: Adds frontmatter field that must be validated vs. always requiring user submission.

platform_decisions.title: Echo Transcript Chain Recovery
platform_decisions.decision: Fix resume chain recovery to detect and avoid bridging into unrelated subagent conversations when a subagent message lands near a main-chain write gap.
platform_decisions.rationale: Prevents conversation mixing across logical boundaries in distributed agent execution. Critical for conversation integrity in multi-agent workflows.
platform_decisions.trades: Requires graph-aware chain traversal vs. simple linearization.

platform_decisions.title: Exponential Backoff Floor for Rate Limit Retries
platform_decisions.decision: Apply exponential backoff as a minimum when server returns small `Retry-After` values, preventing retry storms on 429 responses.
platform_decisions.rationale: Prevents burning entire retry budget in ~13 seconds on backends returning aggressive backoff hints. Improves resilience to transient rate limits.
platform_decisions.trades: User experiences longer delay vs. faster exhaustion of available retries.

platform_decisions.title: Edit Tool Anchor Shortening
platform_decisions.decision: Use shorter `old_string` anchors in Edit tool to reduce output token overhead while maintaining match uniqueness.
platform_decisions.rationale: Reduces token waste on verbose edit context. Improves token efficiency for repeated edits to large files.
platform_decisions.trades: More sophisticated matching logic vs. simpler exact-string replacement.
